mapper.select:
SELECT u.id AS adminId, u.login_id AS adminLoginId, u.name AS adminName, u.email AS adminEmail, u.role AS adminRole, u.permissions AS adminPermissions, u.status AS adminStatus, u.created_by AS adminCreatedBy, u.created_at AS adminCreatedAt, u.last_login AS adminLastLogin, u.read_only AS adminReadOnly,
uta.id AS adminTenantAccessId, uta.user_id AS adminTenantAccessUserId, uta.tenant_id AS adminTenantAccessTenantId, uta.capabilities AS capabilities, uta.account_permissions AS accountPermissions, uta.process_permissions AS processPermissions, uta.created_at AS adminTenantAccessCreatedAt, uta.updated_at AS adminTenantAccessUpdatedAt FROM user u INNER JOIN user_tenant_access uta ON uta.user_id = u.id WHERE uta.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN u.login_id REGEXP '^[0-9]' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN u.login_id REGEXP '^[0-9]' THEN CAST(u.login_id AS UNSIGNED) ELSE ASCII(UPPER(u.login_id)) END, u.login_id ASC

SELECT u.id AS adminId, u.login_id AS adminLoginId, u.name AS adminName, u.email AS adminEmail, u.role AS adminRole, u.permissions AS adminPermissions, u.status AS adminStatus, u.created_by AS adminCreatedBy, u.created_at AS adminCreatedAt, u.last_login AS adminLastLogin, u.read_only AS adminReadOnly,
uta.id AS adminTenantAccessId, uta.user_id AS adminTenantAccessUserId, uta.tenant_id AS adminTenantAccessTenantId, uta.capabilities AS capabilities, uta.account_permissions AS accountPermissions, uta.process_permissions AS processPermissions, uta.created_at AS adminTenantAccessCreatedAt, uta.updated_at AS adminTenantAccessUpdatedAt FROM user u INNER JOIN user_tenant_access uta ON uta.user_id = u.id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND uta.tenant_id = #{tenantId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: insert into user (login_id, name, email, password, secondary_password, role, permissions, status, created_by, created_at, read_only) values (#{loginId}, #{name}, #{email}, #{password}, #{secondaryPassword}, #{role}, #{permissions}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), #{readOnly})
INSERT INTO user_tenant_access (user_id, tenant_id, account_permissions, process_permissions) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tenantId}, #{accountPermissions}, #{processPermissions})
mapper.delete: delete from user where id = #{id} AND status = #{status}
